$schema.description: The URI of the schema for the blueprint meta

blueprintId.description: The unique identifier of the blueprint in format 'Name-Major.Minor.Patch'. Names may contain dots; the OctoMesh convention is that names starting with 'System.' are service-managed (e.g. System.Communication-1.0.0).

description.description: An optional description of the blueprint

ckModelDependencies.description: List of CK model dependencies required by this blueprint

items.description: CK model dependency in format 'Name-[MinVersion,MaxVersion)' (Name may contain dots, e.g. System.Communication).

blueprintDependencies.description: Blueprints that must be installed before this one. Resolved transitively and topo-sorted at install time.

items.description: Blueprint dependency in format 'Name-[MinVersion,MaxVersion)' (Name may contain dots).

seedDataPath.description: Path to the seed data file relative to the blueprint root directory

fromVersion.description: The source version this migration applies from

scriptPath.description: Path to the migration script file (relative to blueprint root)
